name: Jolywood (Suzhou) Sunwatt Co., Ltd.
summary: Jolywood (Suzhou) Sunwatt Co., Ltd. manufactures and sells integrated photovoltaic (PV) products worldwide. It offers solar module backsheets, P-type and N-type mono-crystalline silicon solar cells, and N-type bifacial solar cells; and invests in, installs, and operates distributed PV systems. The company was formerly known as Jolywood (Suzhou) Solar Material Technology Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Jolywood (Suzhou) Sunwatt Co., Ltd. in 2011. Jolywood (Suzhou) Sunwatt Co., Ltd. was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Changzhou, China.
